drawdown_profile.breach_criterion: live_drawdown_from_peak < max_historical_dd (i.e., a deeper drawdown than the worst observed in the verified window 2022-01-21 → 2026-05-28)

exposure_flip_freq_rolling.description: Count of ladder transitions in trailing 90 bars × (365/90). Each daily observation is a 90-day rolling window. Autocorrelated; bands descriptive only.
exposure_flip_freq_rolling.name: exposure_flip_freq_rolling_90d_annualized

rebalance_turnover_per_event.description: Magnitude of |Δposition| at each non-zero transition. Per-event distribution (NOT rolling).
rebalance_turnover_per_event.name: rebalance_turnover_per_event

regime_gate_flip_freq_rolling.description: Count of SMA(200) gate flips (close crossing its SMA) per trailing 90 bars × (365/90). Autocorrelated.
regime_gate_flip_freq_rolling.name: regime_gate_flip_freq_rolling_90d_annualized
